allow: Bash(node -e "for \(const l of ['en','fr']\) { const j=require\('./messages/'+l+'.json'\); console.log\('===',l,'Header==='\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j.Header, null, 2\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const en=require\('./messages/en.json'\); const fr=require\('./messages/fr.json'\); console.log\('en.visibleToPros =', en.Dashboard.settings.visibleToPros\); console.log\('fr.visibleToPros =', fr.Dashboard.settings.visibleToPros\); const ek=Object.keys\(en.Dashboard.settings\), fk=Object.keys\(fr.Dashboard.settings\); const miss=ek.filter\(k=>!fk.includes\(k\)\).concat\(fk.filter\(k=>!ek.includes\(k\)\)\); console.log\('settings key mismatch:', miss.length? miss : 'none — keys in sync'\); console.log\('JSON OK'\);")
Bash(node -e "for \(const l of ['en','fr']\) { const m=require\('./messages/'+l+'.json'\).Header.menuSections; console.log\('['+l+']', JSON.stringify\(m\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('messages/en.json','utf8'\)\); JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('messages/fr.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('JSON OK: both files parse'\);")

Bash(node -e "const en=require\('./messages/en.json'\); const fr=require\('./messages/fr.json'\); const keys=['acceptingNewClientsTitle','acceptingNewClientsOnDesc','acceptingNewClientsOffDesc','acceptingNewClientsError','acceptingNewClientsLabel']; console.log\('--- EN Dashboard.profile ---'\); keys.forEach\(k=>console.log\(k, JSON.stringify\(en.Dashboard?.profile?.[k]\)\)\); console.log\('--- FR Dashboard.profile ---'\); keys.forEach\(k=>console.log\(k, JSON.stringify\(fr.Dashboard?.profile?.[k]\)\)\); console.log\('--- AdminServiceRequests ---'\); ['notAcceptingMarker','notAcceptingWarning'].forEach\(k=>{console.log\('EN',k, JSON.stringify\(en.AdminServiceRequests?.[k]\)\); console.log\('FR',k, JSON.stringify\(fr.AdminServiceRequests?.[k]\)\);}\);")

PowerShell($en = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\merie\\cheminement\\messages\\en.json" -Raw; $fr = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\merie\\cheminement\\messages\\fr.json" -Raw; try { $eo = $en | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "EN JSON: VALID" } catch { Write-Output "EN JSON: INVALID - $_" }; try { $fo = $fr | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "FR JSON: VALID" } catch { Write-Output "FR JSON: INVALID - $_" })

Bash(node -e "const fr=require\('./messages/fr.json'\); const a=fr.Auth||{}; console.log\('memberSignup.creating:', JSON.stringify\(a.memberSignup&&a.memberSignup.creating\)\); console.log\('professionalSignup.creating:', JSON.stringify\(a.professionalSignup&&a.professionalSignup.creating\)\); console.log\('resetPassword.submitting:', JSON.stringify\(a.resetPassword&&a.resetPassword.submitting\)\); console.log\('login.signIn:', JSON.stringify\(a.login&&a.login.signIn\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('./messages/fr.json'\); function find\(o,path\){for\(const k in o\){const p=path?path+'.'+k:k; if\(k==='documents' && o[k] && o[k].uploading==='Upload en cours...'\){console.log\('FOUND:',p\);} if\(typeof o[k]==='object'&&o[k]\) find\(o[k],p\);}} find\(m,''\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const f=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('messages/fr.json','utf8'\)\);const e=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('messages/en.json','utf8'\)\);function flat\(o,p\){let r={};for\(const k in o\){const v=o[k];const key=p?p+'.'+k:k;if\(v&&typeof v==='object'&&!Array.isArray\(v\)\)Object.assign\(r,flat\(v,key\)\);else r[key]=v;}return r;}const fe=flat\(e\),ff=flat\(f\);const onlyE=Object.keys\(fe\).filter\(k=>!\(k in ff\)\);const onlyF=Object.keys\(ff\).filter\(k=>!\(k in fe\)\);console.log\('keys in EN not FR:',onlyE.length\);onlyE.slice\(0,40\).forEach\(k=>console.log\('  EN-only',k\)\);console.log\('keys in FR not EN:',onlyF.length\);onlyF.slice\(0,40\).forEach\(k=>console.log\('  FR-only',k\)\);")

Bash(node -e "JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('messages/fr.json','utf8'\)\); JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('messages/en.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('JSON OK: both message files parse'\)")
